latin: Nocte quadam, Harkonnenes cum exercitu magno Arrakeen oppugnaverunt. proditor inter Atreides erat — medicus ipse Ducis, nomine Yueh, qui scuta defensionis sustulit. Dux Leto captus est et ad Baronem Harkonnen ductus. Leto dentem venenatum in ore celatum fregit ut Baronem necaret, sed Baron effugit. Dux Leto mortuus est, et domus Atreides cecidit.

questions.prompt: Who was the traitor among the Atreides?
What did the traitor do to help the attack?
How did Duke Leto try to kill the Baron?
questions.target: He broke a poisoned tooth hidden in his mouth
choices: He broke a poisoned tooth hidden in his mouth
He challenged him to a duel

questions.prompt: What was the outcome of the attack?
questions.target: Duke Leto died and House Atreides fell
choices: Duke Leto died and House Atreides fell

translation: One night, the Harkonnens attacked Arrakeen with a great army. There was a traitor among the Atreides — the Duke's own doctor, named Yueh, who disabled the defense shields. Duke Leto was captured and brought to Baron Harkonnen. Leto broke a poisoned tooth hidden in his mouth to kill the Baron, but the Baron escaped. Duke Leto died, and House Atreides fell.
